response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song from on-screen text 'ロウワー'. 2. Performed web search for 'ロウワー Nulut Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Extracted lyrics and song metadata. 4. Split video into one musical scene (00:00-03:19) and one dialogue scene (03:20-end).
response.global_summary: The video features a dance performance by virtual characters to the song 'Lower' (ロウワー) by Nulut, followed by a dialogue/sketch between the characters.

scenes.description: Characters perform a dance routine to the song 'Lower' (ロウワー). The song title appears in the top-left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
そう簡単な祈りだった
端から
段々と消える感嘆
今から
緞帳が上がるから
静かな
会場を後にさよなら
言いかけていたことが
一つ消えてまた増えて
背中に後ろめたさが残る
従いたい心根を
吐き出さぬように込めて
胸の中が檻のように濁る
受け止めたいことが
自分さえ抱えられず
持て余したそれを守っている
霞んだ声はからからに
喉を焼いて埋め尽くす
何を言うべきか分からなくて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It was a simple prayer from the start, after all
Admiration gradually disappearing now
As the curtain is raising up
We will leave this quiet meeting place and bid farewell
Words I was about to say
Are disappearing one by one and increasing again
Guilt remains on my back
Trying not to spit out the heart I want to follow
My heart is getting cloudy like a cage
I want to accept it, but I cannot even hold onto myself
I am guarding that which I have leftover
The blurred voice is parched and burns my throat, filling me up
I don't know what I should say

scenes.description: Characters have a dialogue/sketch in a domestic setting.
